supportsInterface(bytes4).details: Returns true if this contract implements the interface defined by `interfaceId`. See the corresponding https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-165#how-interfaces-are-identified[ERC section] to learn more about how these ids are created. This function call must use less than 30 000 gas.

unsafePartiallyCollectAndDistribute(addr.details: Use only as a last resort when collectAndDistribute is permanently blocked.      Failed transfers emit events but do not revert. Stuck tokens remain in the splitter.

EXECUTOR_SENTINEL().notice: Sentinel address meaning "the fulfiller who created the fulfillment".

MAX_SPLITS().notice: Maximum number of splits allowed per decision.

arbitrate(bytes32,bytes32,(address,uint2.notice: Oracle submits a split decision without validation.         Only checks for empty splits and zero-address recipients.

collectAndDistribute(address,bytes32,byt.notice: Collects a token bundle escrow and distributes assets. Reverts if any transfer fails.

unsafePartiallyCollectAndDistribute(addr.notice: Unsafe partial distribution — continues on individual transfer failures.
